_source: MySQL 8.0 Reference Manual — Server Status Variable Reference (dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/8.0/en/server-status-variable-reference.html), curated 2026-04-21
_note: Categories are flat (one primary category per variable). The 'matchers' arrays use prefix patterns (case-insensitive) so new variables added by Percona / MariaDB / future MySQL versions automatically slot into the right category without an explicit JSON entry. Explicit 'members' override matchers when present.

categories.label: Buffer Pool
categories.description: InnoDB buffer pool sizing, residency, eviction and dirty-page health.

categories.label: InnoDB Reads
categories.description: Logical and physical InnoDB reads — buffer-pool hits, disk reads, row-fetches.

categories.label: InnoDB Writes
categories.description: InnoDB write activity — buffer-pool dirty writes, data file writes, row mutations.

categories.label: Redo Log
categories.description: Redo log writes, fsyncs, capacity and LSN advancement.

categories.label: Pending I/O
categories.description: I/O the OS hasn't acknowledged yet — saturation indicator.

categories.label: InnoDB Locks
categories.description: Row-level lock waits and contention.

categories.label: Throughput / QPS
categories.description: Top-line query rate and slow-query count.

categories.label: Com_* DML
categories.description: Data manipulation Com_ statement counters.

categories.label: Com_* Transactions
categories.description: Transaction control Com_ counters.

categories.label: Com_* DDL
categories.description: Schema-change Com_ counters (CREATE / ALTER / DROP).

categories.label: Com_* Prepared
categories.description: Prepared-statement Com_ counters.

categories.label: Handlers
categories.description: Storage-engine row operations as seen by the SQL layer.

categories.label: Table Cache
categories.description: Table-open-cache hits, misses and overflows.

categories.label: Open Tables
categories.description: Currently-open file/table/definition counts.

categories.label: Tmp Tables
categories.description: On-disk vs in-memory temporary-table creation.

categories.label: Sort
categories.description: Sort operations — merge passes, ranges, rows and scans.

categories.label: Select Patterns
categories.description: Optimizer access-path counts: full joins, scans, ranges.

categories.label: Threads
categories.description: Connection-thread cache, active threads, slow launches.

categories.label: Network / Connections
categories.description: Bytes in/out, connection counts, accept errors.

categories.label: Binary Log
categories.description: Binary-log cache use and statement-cache statistics.

categories.label: Replication
categories.description: Replica/source/semi-sync replication counters.

categories.label: MyISAM Keys
categories.description: MyISAM key-cache statistics.

categories.label: SSL / TLS
categories.description: TLS handshake and session-cache stats.

categories.label: Performance Schema
categories.description: Performance-schema instrumentation overhead and lost-event counts.
